title: Proxy Mailbox & Sync

classes.name: MailboxStore
public_methods: send({type, payload, channel?, priority?, refId?, expiresAt?}): {message_id, status}
writeInbound({id?, type, payload, channel?, priority?, refId?, expiresAt?}): string
poll({channel?, type?, limit?}): message[]          // pending inbound
pollOutbound({channel?, limit?}): message[]         // pending outbound, priority-sorted
ack(messageIds: string|string[]): number            // mark inbound delivered
list({type, direction?, status?, limit?, offset?}): message[]
compact(): void   // rewrites JSONL to current state only
classes.notes: JSONL persistence for messages; JSON for state. Message statuses: pending|synced|delivered|failed|rejected. Terminal statuses evict from in-memory index. Supports schema migrations via MIGRATIONS registry.

classes.name: SyncEngine
classes.constructor: constructor({store, hubUrl, getHeaders, logger?, onInboundReceived?, onAuthError?})
public_methods: notifyNewOutbound(): void  // triggers early outbound flush at 100ms
private_methods: _isIdle(): boolean  // true if > 5 min since last activity
_scheduleInbound(delayMs): void   // recursive timer; calls inbound.pull() + inbound.ackDelivered()
classes.timer_logic: Outbound: 1s if pending>0, else 5s. Inbound: 10s active, 60s idle.

method_details.pull: POST ${hubUrl}/a2a/mailbox/inbound with {sender_id, proxy_protocol_version, cursor, limit}. Calls store.getCursor(), store.getState('node_id'), store.writeInboundBatch(), store.setCursor(). Timeout: 35s. Throws AuthError on 401/403.
method_details.ackDelivered: Fetches delivered inbound via store.list(), POST ${hubUrl}/a2a/mailbox/ack with {sender_id, message_ids[]}. Timeout: 10s.

method_details.flush: Calls store.pollOutbound({channel, limit:50}). POST ${hubUrl}/a2a/mailbox/outbound with {sender_id, proxy_protocol_version, messages[]}. Timeout: 30s. On success: store.updateStatusBatch(synced), store.incrementRetry(failed if retries<10) or mark failed, store.writeInboundBatch(hub responses), store.setState('last_sync_at'). On network error: store.incrementRetry() for all pending. Throws AuthError on 401/403.

classes.name: AuthError
classes.notes: External dependency, not in scope. Thrown/caught by InboundSync and OutboundSync on HTTP 401/403. Propagated to SyncEngine._handleAuthError().

relationships: SyncEngine COMPOSES OutboundSync  (instantiates in constructor, stores as this.outbound)
SyncEngine COMPOSES InboundSync   (instantiates in constructor, stores as this.inbound)
OutboundSync DEPENDS_ON MailboxStore (injected; calls pollOutbound, getState, incrementRetry, updateStatusBatch, writeInboundBatch, setState)
InboundSync DEPENDS_ON MailboxStore  (injected; calls getCursor, getState, writeInboundBatch, setCursor, list)
OutboundSync IMPORTS PROXY_PROTOCOL_VERSION from MailboxStore module
InboundSync IMPORTS PROXY_PROTOCOL_VERSION from MailboxStore module
SyncEngine DEPENDS_ON AuthError   (instanceof checks in error handlers)

message_model.fields: id (UUIDv7), channel, direction (inbound|outbound), type, status, payload, priority (high|normal|low), ref_id, created_at, synced_at, expires_at, retry_count, error
message_model.statuses: pending → synced|delivered|failed|rejected  (terminal statuses evict from index)

key_design_notes: MailboxStore is the single persistence layer; all sync classes access it via injection.
SyncEngine orchestrates both pipelines with adaptive polling intervals.
OutboundSync can receive hub response messages and writes them back as inbound via store.writeInboundBatch().
InboundSync uses cursor-based pagination for hub polling.
AuthError propagates from sync classes up to SyncEngine which calls onAuthError callback.
MailboxStore uses JSONL append-log with in-memory index; compact() rewrites to current state.
